name: io.github.lacausecrypto/sophon
title: Sophon
description: Honest token economics for MCP agents. 68% tokens saved, zero-ML Rust binary.

runtimeArguments.description: Start the Sophon MCP stdio server.

optionalFeatures.semanticRetriever: Activated via SOPHON_RETRIEVER_PATH env var. Adds query-time retrieval to compress_history. Deterministic HashEmbedder (no ML at runtime). See BENCHMARK.md § 5.
optionalFeatures.treeSitter: Activated via cargo feature codebase-navigator/tree-sitter. Swaps the regex extractors for AST-accurate parsing across 11 languages (Rust, Python, JS, TS, TSX, Go, Ruby, Java, C/C++, PHP, Kotlin, Swift). +8 MB in the binary, parallelised via rayon.
optionalFeatures.hyde: Activated via SOPHON_HYDE=1. Haiku writes hypothetical answers used as retrieval queries, results fused via RRF. +17 pt open-domain and single-hop on LOCOMO N=30. See BENCHMARK.md § 5.1.
optionalFeatures.factCards: Activated via SOPHON_FACT_CARDS=1. Haiku extracts entity-indexed timeline JSON. +17 pt temporal on LOCOMO N=30.
optionalFeatures.entityGraph: Activated via SOPHON_ENTITY_GRAPH=1. Heuristic NER + bipartite entity-chunk graph + 1-hop bridge. +17 pt multi-hop on LOCOMO N=30. Pure Rust, deterministic, ~10 ms overhead.
optionalFeatures.adaptive: Activated via SOPHON_ADAPTIVE=1. Haiku classifies query as factual_recall vs general and bumps top_k + budget accordingly.
optionalFeatures.llmRerank: Activated via SOPHON_LLM_RERANK=1. One Haiku call rescores top-(3×k) candidates before token budget trim.
optionalFeatures.tailSummary: Activated via SOPHON_TAIL_SUMMARY=1. Haiku compresses chunks K+1..K+10 into a single paragraph appended to context.
optionalFeatures.graphMemory: Activated via SOPHON_GRAPH_MEMORY=1 (experimental). Ingest-time LLM triple extraction; query time is pure Rust graph traversal. SOPHON_GRAPH_MEMORY_PATH enables JSON persistence.
